# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://www.webapp1.com"
        - "https://www.webapp2.com"
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization

  - name: basic-auth
    enabled: true
    route:
      name: basic-auth-plugin-route
      config:
        hide_credentials: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    service:
      name: rate-limiting-plugin-service
      config:
        hour: 1000
        day: 5000
